'''Vellity''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="AE" /> in the [[Trax sector/Legends|Trax sector's]] [[Vellity system/Legends|Vellity system]], located in the [[Mid Rim/Legends|Mid Rim]].<ref name="TEA-OC" /> An agrarian world, it was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of the [[Near-Human]] [[Borneck]].<ref name="AE" />
